name: integration_i_spent_4_months_building_a_micro_saas_n
method: I spent 4 months building a micro SaaS nobody used. Then I studied what Marc Lou did and rebuilt everything. Month 4 post-launch. Eleven users. Two of them were my friends testing it as a favour. Reve

phases.name: scrape_success_patterns
steps: scrape r/micro_saas top posts for revenue-confirmed methods
scrape Marc Lou shipfast launches for problem categories
scrape IndieHackers revenue interviews for problem taxonomy

phases.name: extract_problem_taxonomy
steps: LLM-extract problem category + demand signals from scraped data

phases.name: score_existing_apps
steps: score all APP_FACTORY_METHODS.csv entries against problem-demand matrix
flag apps with low demand validation
